info.description: OpenAPI projection of the inventory pillar's REST contract. Authored as a ts-rest contract (src/contract/rest.ts); consumed directly by polyglot clients and via openapi-typescript by TS consumers.
info.title: @pops/inventory

delete.summary: Disconnect two items by their item ids

post.summary: Connect two items (A<B ordering enforced server-side)

delete.summary: Unlink a document by link id

get.summary: List fixtures with optional filters
Get a single fixture
List inventory items with filters, pagination and value totals
Find an item by exact asset id (case-insensitive); null if absent
Count items whose asset id starts with a prefix (case-insensitive)
Distinct non-null item types
Get a single inventory item
List connections for an item
Connection subgraph (nodes + edges) for an item
Trace the connection chain from an item as a tree
List documents linked to an item

post.summary: Link a Paperless document to an item

get.summary: List fixtures connected to an item

delete.summary: Disconnect an item from a fixture

post.summary: Connect an item to a fixture

get.summary: List photos for an item

post.summary: Upload a photo (base64 JSON body); compressed + stored server-side
Attach a photo by an already-stored relative file path

get.summary: List uploaded files for an item

post.summary: Upload a document file (base64 JSON body); validated + stored server-side

get.summary: List all locations (flat)
Location hierarchy as a nested tree

delete.summary: Delete a location; without force, returns confirmation stats when non-empty

get.summary: Get a single location
Direct child locations of a location
Counts of children / items affected by deleting a location
Ancestor chain (root → location) for breadcrumbs
Search Paperless-ngx documents (412 if not configured)
Whether Paperless-ngx is configured and reachable

patch.summary: Update a photo’s caption / sort order

get.summary: Dashboard summary (counts, totals, warranty alerts, recent items)
Insurance report: items grouped by location with totals
Replacement-value breakdown grouped by location
Replacement-value breakdown grouped by item type
Items with a warranty expiry, sorted by expiry

post.summary: Search the inventory pillar's items for the unified search engine

get.summary: List effective values for every declared key (sensitive redacted)

post.summary: Batch-read settings by key (missing omitted; sensitive redacted)
Reset declared keys to defaults (omit keys ⇒ reset all)
Transactional batch write (all-or-nothing); returns the written mirror

get.summary: Read a single setting (null on unset; sensitive redacted)

post.summary: Internal-only write-once seed (encryption seed / client id)
Reset a single setting to its manifest default

delete.summary: Remove an uploaded file (db row + file)
